entity.summary: HyperEVM decentralized exchange providing token swaps, concentrated-liquidity positions, liquidity management, portfolio views, and related onchain trading interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party application surfaces expose token swaps, liquidity management, and portfolio navigation. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Project X swap interface
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes the Project X swap route together with exchange navigation for Swap, Liquidity, and Portfolio functions.

evidence.title: Project X liquidity interface
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes the live liquidity-management route alongside the swap and portfolio surfaces, supporting active exchange classification.
